chinese_text: 聖人無常心，以百姓心為心。
translation_text: The sage has no invariable mind of his own; he makes the mind of the people his mind.

chinese_text: 善者，吾善之；不善者，吾亦善之，
translation_text: To those who are good (to me), I am good; and to those who are not good (to me), I am also good; - and thus (all) get to be good.
To those who are sincere (with me), I am sincere; and to those who are not sincere (with me), I am also sincere; - and thus (all) get to be sincere.

chinese_text: 信者，吾信之；不信者，吾亦信之，德信。聖人在天下歙歙，為天下渾其心，
translation_text: The sage has in the world an appearance of indecision, and keeps his mind in a state of indifference to all.

chinese_text: 百姓皆注其耳目,聖人皆孩之。
translation_text: The people all keep their eyes and ears directed to him, and he deals with them all as his children.
